seo.title: Banting marrow - sweet and delicious - Marinda Kook

html:
Look, I went and looked up what this squash is called and came to the conclusion that it's a huge marrow. Well, it brought a lot of enjoyment to our house.

 

YOU'LL NEED;

  • 1/2 marrow
  • butter – as much as you need
  • cinnamon sugar ( I mixed diet sugar with cinnamon. – 100ml diet sugar and 20 ml ground cinnamon)

NOW:

  1. cut the marrow lengthwise in half and scrape out the seeds
  2. spread generously with butter
  3. sprinkle cinnamon sugar over it
  4. cover with tinfoil and bake for 40 to 60 min at 180 degrees (feel if it's soft)

This sweet treat can be served as a side dish with any meal. You eat it and you don't feel like you're missing out on anything sweet. If you want to serve it as a main dish you can skip the sweetness and fill it with seasoned mince instead.
